texto: Sometimes we call what we do not understand primitive, sometimes magic. Each of us has a perspective to which we are attached. We only understand the other in relation to what we already know, but by believing, sympathising, even empathising, sometimes we can see beyond the limits of our knowledge. The alternative is to ignore or to attack.
explicacao: Citação de Christopher Potter sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes we call what we do not understand primitive, sometimes magic. Each of us has a perspect…” articula reflexao, empathy, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
